_description: Shared model registry for all AIXIA-workspace projects. Projects resolve model family → current_version at runtime from this file. Maintained by the bi-weekly model-release crawler (scheduled trigger). See ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md §9.5 for policy.
_bootstrap_note: This is the bootstrap state from 2026-04-20. Entries marked bootstrap_unverified: true are seeded from CLAUDE Code context and should be verified on the first crawler run. Pricing drifts; registry values are authoritative — always re-read at call-time.

claude_opus.notes: Pricing and version verified May 18, 2026; no change. claude-opus-4-7 remains current at $5/$25. Vision resolution 3.3× vs Opus 4.6 (up to 2,576px long edge). New tokenizer may use 1.0–1.35× more tokens than Opus 4.6 for the same input — audit token budgets if switching from 4.6.

claude_sonnet.notes: Pricing and version verified May 18, 2026; no change.

claude_haiku.notes: Pricing and version verified May 18, 2026; no change.

deepseek_general.notes: Pricing and version verified May 18, 2026; no change. deepseek-v4-flash: 284B total / 13B active params (MoE), 1M context, Thinking+Non-Thinking dual mode. Cache hits at 1/10 standard rate. Compatible with OpenAI ChatCompletions and Anthropic API formats. Chinese-server jurisdiction — disclose in ToS. Router fallback: deepseek → claude_haiku → claude_sonnet.

deepseek_reasoning.notes: Pricing confirmed $0.55/$2.19 (cache hits: $0.14/M input). Verified May 18, 2026; no change. DeepSeek-R2 not yet released. R1 remains ~96% cheaper than OpenAI o1 for comparable tasks. Note: deepseek_v4_pro supports Thinking mode at 1M context if R1's 64K limit is too small.

deepseek_v4_pro.notes: 🚨 75% PROMOTIONAL DISCOUNT EXPIRED June 1, 2026 — standard rate $1.74/$3.48 per million tokens now active. Projects budgeted at the promo rate ($0.435/$0.87) face a 4× cost increase effective immediately. Audit all AIXIA-workspace projects routing to this model. 1.6T total / 49B active params (large MoE), 1M context, Thinking+Non-Thinking dual mode. Compatible with OpenAI ChatCompletions and Anthropic API formats.

gemini_pro_multimodal.notes: Pricing verified May 18, 2026; no change. Release date corrected to GA date: 2026-02-19. Tiered pricing: $2/$12 up to 200K tokens; $4/$18 above 200K. Gemini Pro models are now paid-only (free tier removed April 1, 2026). Handles YouTube URL ingest via file_data.file_uri. Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite reached GA on May 7, 2026 (see gemini_flash notes).

gemini_flash.notes: Pricing and version verified May 18, 2026; no change. Budget alternative: gemini-3.1-flash-lite at $0.25/$1.50 — reached GA on May 7, 2026 (previously preview). Flash retains free tier with reduced daily quota. Batch API: 50% off for async workloads. Cached input: $0.20/M (90% discount).

openai_gpt.notes: 🚨 UPDATED: gpt-5.4 → gpt-5.5 (released April 23, 2026). Price DOUBLED: $2.50/$15.00 → $5.00/$30.00 per million tokens (100% increase on both input and output). Context window: 1M (922K input / 128K output). Adds native computer use and strongest agentic-coding benchmark scores OpenAI has shipped. Fine-tuning NOT supported for GPT-5.5; OpenAI deprecated its fine-tuning API in May 2026 — any downstream project using fine-tuned GPT models must migrate. Also available: gpt-5.5-pro ($30/$180). GPT-Realtime-2 (voice, GPT-5-class reasoning) launched May 7 via Realtime API — not tracked as a separate family. Not currently used by AIXIA projects.

openai_reasoning.notes: Verified May 18, 2026; no change. o4-mini outperforms o3-mini at ~50% lower cost. o3 also available ($2.00/M input, 200K context). IMPORTANT: reasoning tokens billed at output rate — effective cost 5–20× listed rate. No o5 release confirmed this cycle. Not currently used by AIXIA projects.

mistral_large.notes: Pricing and version verified May 18, 2026; no change. Mistral Large 3 2512: 262K context, EU-hosted option for data-residency-sensitive tiers.

mistral_small.notes: Pricing and version verified May 18, 2026; no change. Mistral Small 4 (mistral-small-2603): MoE 119B total / 6B active params, 256K context, native multimodal. Cheapest EU-residency multimodal option at $0.15/$0.60.

mistral_medium.notes: Pricing and version verified May 18, 2026; no change. Mistral Medium 3.5 (April 29, 2026): dense 128B open-weight; unifies instruction-following, reasoning, and coding into one set of weights. 256K context, EU data residency. Output cost ($7.50/M) is 5× mistral_large — only worth it when unified reasoning+coding at long context is required. For pure reasoning tasks with smaller context, see mistral_reasoning (magistral-medium-2506).

mistral_reasoning.notes: NEW ENTRY (May 18, 2026). Magistral is Mistral's dedicated chain-of-thought reasoning model family (released June 2025; discovered/added to registry this cycle). magistral-medium-2506: $2.00/$5.00 per million tokens, 41K context. Budget option: magistral-small-2506 at $0.50/$1.50, 40K context. EU data residency via La Plateforme. Context window (41K) is intentionally compact for focused reasoning tasks — switch to mistral_medium (256K) when long context is also needed. Distinguishes from mistral_medium: Magistral is specialized pure-reasoning; Medium 3.5 unifies reasoning+coding+chat at 256K but costs $7.50/M output.

llama.notes: Pricing and version verified May 18, 2026; no change. Llama 4 Maverick: 17B active params, 128 experts (400B total), 1M context, natively multimodal MoE. API pricing reflects third-party providers (Together AI, Fireworks, Groq, AWS Bedrock, etc.). Also: Llama 4 Scout (same price, 10M context) for extreme-context tasks; Llama 4 Behemoth (288B active) announced but not yet generally available. Both Maverick and Scout Apache 2.0 open-weight. No new Llama releases this cycle.

grok.notes: Pricing and version verified May 18, 2026; no change to model or pricing. New this cycle: Grok Build coding agent launched May 14, 2026 — terminal-native agentic coding, SuperGrok Heavy subscribers only ($300/month), NOT available via API. Voice APIs (STT/TTS) live since April 17, 2026; Custom Voices announced April 30. Reasoning always active, cannot be disabled. 🚨 Context window is 1M (not 2M) — any AIXIA project needing >1M context must use gemini_pro_multimodal. Grok 5 in training on Colossus 2 supercluster — no release date. Tiered pricing: requests exceeding 200K total tokens billed at higher rate.

routing_defaults.description: Canonical default routing for common task categories. Projects override as needed in their local CLAUDE.md.

privacy_mode_routing.description: When a project/tier enables Privacy Mode, all calls route through Claude only (no DeepSeek, no third-party-jurisdiction routes). Studio-tier Echoform users default to Privacy Mode.
